degradations: market universe: 賽道輪動採單一供應商分類，只作背景
market universe: BTC 財庫公司持倉為單一第三方聚合，只作背景
market universe: ETH 財庫公司持倉為單一第三方聚合，只作背景
market universe: BTC ETF 流向僅有第三方單一來源，不作硬觸發
market universe: ETH ETF 流向沒有穩定的免金鑰交叉來源，因此顯示未知

degradations: Stablecoin and RWA providers expose no uniform upstream observation timestamp
Public-company treasury aggregation exposes retrieval time rather than upstream filing time
structural_context_quality.verification_scope: formula integrity, timestamps and declared source semantics; not an independent reconstruction of every upstream dataset

policy.daily_equity_snapshot_basis: Yahoo regular-market close preferred; Nasdaq quote is backup/freshness evidence
required_sources: BTC/ETH 現貨來源池至少 2 個：CoinGecko、Coinbase、Kraken
not_hard_triggers: realized loss without stable free API
Google Trends without official unauthenticated API
macro calendar without official free event API

derivatives: Deribit near-90-day dated futures with OKX fallback
Deribit DVOL/options with labeled OKX ATM-IV/options fallback
market_universe.coverage_rule: provider failures are incidents, not quality downgrades, when the field still passes source-count, freshness and divergence checks; unknown data never becomes zero
